proposal_summary: Gauntlet recommends updating risk parameters including Liquidation Penalty, Liquidation Factor, and Collateral Factor for WETH and wstETH collateral assets across multiple Compound V3 deployments on Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, and Polygon.

disclosed_entities.name: Configurator
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The proposal updates the parameters by using the respective methods on the Configurator.

disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: V3 Polygon USDC/USDT | WETH | Liquidation Penalty

claimed_actions.raw_action: The proposal updates the parameters by using the respective methods on the Configurator.
